contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Surfaced proposal on how to collaborate with FounderHaus
  
  @⁨Nima Kaz⁩ and @⁨Paloma - Founder Haus Florianopolid⁩
  
  I was thinking the best way to meet the requirements of both Liz and Shena while tapping onto what is currently already running in FounderHaus is to perhaps have FounderHaus have its own ledger which comes along with your own QR code
  
  This physical QR code will be displayed on your table which allows people to scan and they buy a Tree when you are offering cacao tea during the cacao circle
  
  Proceeds from the purchase will be trackable on your own ledger all the way till the point the fund has planted a tree and the patron has received an email update that the tree has been planted along with its location
  
  https://truesight.me/lineage-register.html?cap=trees
  
  FounderHaus will have your own profile page which also indicates how many trees have been already planted because of community activities happening in FOunderHaus
  
  Also the 500 bars will be tracked via this same ledger. 
  
  Once your program profile page is up, it will be listed here as well 
  https://truesight.me/programs.html
  
  The proceeds from the QR code scans will be funneled into the bank account controlled by the brazilian CNPJ that is getting registered.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: image.png
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260604215357_gary_teh_image.png
